title: [InstCombine] Fix a cycle when folding fneg(select) with scalable vector types
summary: The generalization extends constant folding for `fneg` from fixed vectors to support scalable vectors (`<vscale x N x T>`). The patch refactors `ConstantFoldUnaryInstruction` by first checking for a generic `VectorType` instead of only `FixedVectorType`. It retains the fast splat optimization for both vector types. Then, it conditionally processes fixed vectors by extracting and folding each element individually, leaving scalable vectors to fall through without folding (returning `nullptr`), as they cannot be decomposed into known-length element sequences. This approach preserves existing behavior for fixed vectors while gracefully handling scalable vectors by avoiding unsupported operations, ensuring the transformation remains safe and applicable to broader IR patterns, including those with scalable vectors and constant expressions involving `fneg`.
